allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $url = "https://www.apra.gov.au/sites/default/files/2026-04/Monthly%20authorised%20deposit-taking%20institution%20statistics%20back-series%20March%202019%20-%20March%202026.xlsx"; $out = "C:\\D3\\market_share\\market_share_backseries_mar26.xlsx"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; "OK"; Get-Item $out | Select-Object Name, Length } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
